title: Skiller conflicts list output
description: Output of `skiller conflicts list --json` (design doc §7). A source-aware union of the conflicts a fresh plan would record and the conflicts persisted in the state ledger (§6.8; M1 build-design §12 Q5). Each entry is tagged with provenance so a reader can tell a live, manifest-derived conflict from one remembered in the ledger.

provenance.description: Where this conflict was observed: from a fresh plan over the supplied manifest, from the persisted ledger, or both.
